channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Democrats blast Trump for Iran ‘war crimes’ threat; Republicans supportive
item.description: Several members of US Congress question president's fitness for office after his expletive-laden Easter Sunday message.

item.title: How Asia became ground zero for the oil crisis
item.description: As the Iran war disrupts oil flows, fuel shortages hit Asia first. Is this the start of a wider global energy crisis?

item.title: Trump warns deadline ‘final’ as Iran pushes proposal to end war
item.description: US president says proposal not enough to avert threat to infrastructure should Iran fail to open Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump praised airman’s rescue in Iran during White House Easter event
item.description: Donald Trump praised the rescue of a downed American airman in Iran during remarks at the White House Easter Egg roll.

item.title: Israeli army fire on WHO vehicle in southern Gaza kills one, medics report
item.description: WHO driver Majdi Aslan was killed and a WHO doctor wounded, along with several other Palestinians.

item.title: Where are Iran’s power plants that Trump has threatened to destroy?
item.description: US President Trump threatens to destroy power plants, bridges by 8pm Tuesday if Iran doesn't open the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Ukraine strikes Russian Black Sea energy hub Novorossiysk
item.description: Ukraine increases attacks on Russia's energy infrastructure in bid to disrupt financing of its war.

item.title: In maps and photos: Five Iranian civilian bridges at risk of US strikes
item.description: A look at the multimillion-dollar mega structures that could be threatened by Trump's 'Bridge Day' ultimatum.

item.title: The US could still try to play the ethnic card in Iran
item.description: But past experience and current geopolitical realities show such a strategy is doomed to failure.

item.title: ‘Smell’ of war comes to St Petersburg as Ukraine hammers Russian refineries
item.description: Ukraine aims to drain Russia's war chest with drone strikes on Pokrovsk and Ust-Luga oil facilities on the Baltic Sea.
